Our Products

Explore Dr Lolo Cosmetics product collections, from skincare and body care to glow sets, oils, soaps, serums, creams, and specialty beauty products.

Order via WhatsApp

Find the Right Product for Your Routine

Dr Lolo Cosmetics offers a wide selection of beauty, skincare, glow, body care, and specialty products. Our collections include Rapid Glow, Pink Glow, Miranda Glow, Marina Gold, Evert Glow, and Rana Slim products. Product availability may vary, so customers can contact us directly on WhatsApp to confirm stock, prices, and current offers.

Collection 1

Rapid Glow Collection

Rapid Glow Serum, Rapid Glow Body Lotion, Rapid Glow Face Cream, Rapid Glow Oil / Whitening Oil, Rapid Glow Soap, and Rapid Glow Full Set.

Shop Rapid Glow
Collection 2

Telesa Pink Glow Collection

Telesa Pink Glow Serum, Telesa Pink Glow Whitening Face Cream, Telesa Pink Glow Body Cream, and Telesa Pink Glow Full Set.

Shop Pink Glow
Collection 3

Miranda / Mirandy Glow Collection

Miranda Glow Lotion, Miranda Glow Advance Serum, Mirandy Glow Whitening Face Cream, Mirandy Glow Glutathione Drip / Super Whitening Product, and Miranda Glow Full Set.

Shop Miranda Glow
Collection 4

Marina Glow Gold Collection

Marina Glow Gold 24K Shower Gel, Marina Glow Serum, Marina Glow Whitening Face Cream, and Marina Glow Gold Full Set.

Shop Marina Gold
Collection 5

Evert Glow Collection

Evert Glow Super Whiten, Evert Glow Soap / Cream Product, and Evert Glow Skin Care Box Product.

Shop Evert Glow
Collection 6

Rana Slim / Rana Slimming

Rana Slim Fruit Vegetable Fiber Enzyme Powder, Rana Slimming Powder, and Rana Slim Supplement Product.

Shop Rana Slim

Important Note

Product results may vary from person to person. Customers are encouraged to read product instructions carefully and contact Dr Lolo Cosmetics for product information before use. For sensitive skin or medical skin concerns, consult a qualified skincare or health professional before starting any new product.

Ready to Order Your Beauty Products?

Contact Dr Lolo Cosmetics today to check product availability, ask for prices, or place your order directly through WhatsApp.

Chat on WhatsAppContact Us

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian beauty and cosmetics brand offering skincare, body care, glow products, oils, serums, creams, soaps, and beauty sets from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam.
